title: Mandala Hearts（Stay True Compat）
description: Link Mandala's GUI and Colorful Hearts, but Stay True compat!
body:
## 概述 / Overview
- **将 Mandala's GUI 和 Colorful Hearts 进行联动（Stay True 兼容版）；需要游戏内装载了 Mandala's GUI 和 Colorful Hearts，再将此资源包放到 Mandala's GUI 上.**
- **Link Mandala's GUI and Colorful Hearts ( Stay True Compat Edition ), Mandala's GUI and Colorful Hearts need to be loaded in the game； and then put this resource package on Mandala's GUI.**
## 其他 / Others
- **其他下载链接 / Other download interlinkage：https://xyebbs.com/res-id/mdlcole**
- **所需前置资源 / Pre-required resources：[Stay True (Curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)、[Mandala's GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode) and [Colorful Hearts](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-hearts)**
